name: media-generation
description: Generate images, videos, speech, and transcriptions through 13 AI providers (OpenAI, Google, Azure, ElevenLabs, Deepgram, Fal.ai, Luma, Replicate, Stability, Runway, OpenRouter, MiniMax, Edge TTS). Supports 100+ models with structured JSON output for agent integration.

skills.name: media-generation
skills.description: Generate and edit images, create videos, synthesize speech, transcribe and translate audio using multiple AI providers.
